name: UNLV Writing Center Video Resources
summary: The UNLV Writing Center offers a series helpful writing videos on our YouTube channel as a resource for students, faculty, and staff. Check out the newest video, Doing the REPs , focused on the final stages of the writing process: revising, editing, and proofreading.
